last_message.body: ci ran for 67 minutes to tell me clippy is not happy 🫃🫃🫃
we are shipping it anyway and i will not be taking questions
spent six hours on my status bar to avoid one assignment
is this the mockup or a cry for help
so nobody is driving. we are simply manifesting the mountain
she walked across my keyboard and the test suite went green
it's not about geography, it's about vibes
leg day is a psyop and i am the only one talking about it
fourth round and now they want a take home 😭
chapter 7 was a full crashout and i mean that as praise
no skips on this one, i checked
restarted it. we do not talk about why

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: the coreutils discourse is back on r/rust and i am not emotionally equipped for it

!rust:demo.local.name: Marcus
!rust:demo.local.body: we are NOT doing gpl versus mit tonight

!rust:demo.local.name: Kai
!rust:demo.local.body: /g/ has had a thread up since tuesday. 400 posts, zero lines of code between them

!rust:demo.local.name: Kai
!rust:demo.local.body: rewriting coreutils in rust is fine. relicensing the entire userland on the way past is 6 7 behaviour

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: half of that thread has never written c or rust. they are purely there for the blood

!rust:demo.local.name: You
!rust:demo.local.body: i read 400 replies of it and learned nothing. i would do it again tonight

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: none of it matters until it breaks one shell script written in 1994 and then it is the only thing that matters

reply.body: rewriting coreutils in rust is fine. relicensing the entire userland on the way past is 6 7 behaviour

!rust:demo.local.name: Marcus
!rust:demo.local.body: speaking of things living rent free in my head. the serde blob

!rust:demo.local.name: Kai
!rust:demo.local.body: a build script shipping a prebuilt binary was genuinely insane

!rust:demo.local.name: You
!rust:demo.local.body: and every one of us ran cargo update within the hour anyway

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: supply chain talk on the conference stage, cargo update in the terminal. we are not a serious people

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: someone told me yesterday that unsafe is fine as long as you are careful

!rust:demo.local.name: Marcus
!rust:demo.local.body: that exact sentence has ended more programs than the borrow checker has ever saved

!rust:demo.local.name: Kai
!rust:demo.local.body: hot take while we are all here: tokio is not a runtime, it is a personality

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: you cannot name a runtime in this room without someone rewriting it in a different executor by friday

!rust:demo.local.name: Marcus
!rust:demo.local.body: async traits took a decade and people are still out here writing Box::pin(async move {}) like animals

!rust:demo.local.name: You
!rust:demo.local.body: i am the animal. i wrote that yesterday

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: the way you typed that with your whole chest 😭

reply.body: i am the animal. i wrote that yesterday

!rust:demo.local.name: Kai
!rust:demo.local.body: meanwhile the kernel thread is 600 replies from people who write neither rust nor kernels

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: one of them proposed rewriting the scheduler. in a comment. with no code attached

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: and the top reply is some chud who read the code of conduct once and has been recovering ever since

!rust:demo.local.name: Marcus
!rust:demo.local.body: chud behaviour honestly

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: took a clean build to a cafe so it would have somewhere nice to fail. still compiling

!rust:demo.local.name: You
!rust:demo.local.body: the real controversy was compile times all along

!rust:demo.local.name: Priya
!rust:demo.local.body: i have carried this crate since 1.0 and my thanks is an issue titled "why slow" 🫃

!rust:demo.local.name: You
!rust:demo.local.body: let them cook. the build is red for artistic reasons 🫃🫃

!rust:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!rust:demo.local.body: ci ran for 67 minutes to tell me clippy is not happy 🫃🫃🫃

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Nadia
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: the sidebar rewrite is up, someone look at it before i lose my nerve

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: You
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: 6 7 files changed and i reviewed two of them. merging

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Marcus
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: committed to the bit and to the main branch

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Kai
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: nadia solo carried this entire release 🫃

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Priya
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: she has been cooking for three sprints and we have been eating

reply.body: nadia solo carried this entire release 🫃

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Vera 🏳️‍⚧️
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: i left one comment that said "nice" and logged off

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Kai
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: someone put our release on r/programming and the top comment is "why not just use electron"

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Nadia
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: i am in this channel by the way. i can see all of this

!matrixhq:demo.local.name: Vera 🏳️‍⚧️
!matrixhq:demo.local.body: we are shipping it anyway and i will not be taking questions

!sarah:demo.local.name: You

!ohio:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!ohio:demo.local.body: genuine question, why is this chat called ohio gang. we all live in berlin

!ohio:demo.local.name: You
!ohio:demo.local.body: marcus named his wifi network 6 7 skibidi ohio and now we are all paying for it

!ohio:demo.local.name: Priya
!ohio:demo.local.body: my mother connected to it at the barbecue and asked me what it meant

!ohio:demo.local.name: Sarah Chen
!ohio:demo.local.body: and what did you tell her

!ohio:demo.local.name: Priya
!ohio:demo.local.body: i said it was the brand of the router

!ohio:demo.local.name: Marcus
!ohio:demo.local.body: it's not about geography, it's about vibes
